case_title: CACH, LLC VS. MARINA LAWSON et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LAWSON, MARINA AN INDIVIDUAL
